title: Noli Totems
description: Replaces the totem of undying with the noli hallucination sprite from Forsaken, as well as some other noli skins!
body:
This resource pack replaces the totem of undying with the noli hallucination sprite from forsaken, as well as other noli skins. This pack also adds the sound effects from forsaken as well as changing the subtitles and the name of the totem.

Note: Each version includes a different skin (I recommend you to download each version from modrinth and not from prism launcher)

I made this because the animation from forsaken looks almost exactly like the totem of undying so i decided to make this, not sure why there wasn't a resource pack for this already but here it is now

I recommend using Inventory Totem by Rick South which will use the totem from your inventory instead of you holding it, really makes it much more better visually
